reasoning: RFK Jr. has long maintained that environmental factors (like vaccines or thimerosal) are the cause of autism. Given that he already claims to know the cause, it is highly illogical for him to make a novel, formal announcement that his team has "identified a definitive cause" during this specific short timeframe, as it would imply he had previously been uncertain. Establishing a "definitive cause" in a manner that satisfies even his own team's announcement threshold requires resources and focus that are better spent on political or advocacy efforts. Without evidence of a specific, highly publicized task force preparing such a report by the October deadline, the probability of this specific event occurring is extremely low.
